blocks.en: Let's trace one message from an app to the air and back. Each layer adds what the next one needs, like nested envelopes — and peels it off on the way out.
blocks.zh: 让我们追踪一条消息：从应用程序到空口再返回。每一层都为下一层加上所需的东西，像一层层套叠的信封——并在送出时逐层拆开。

blocks.en:
sequenceDiagram
  participant App
  participant MAC
  participant PHY
  participant AP
  App->>MAC: data (MSDU)
  MAC->>PHY: framed bytes + addresses
  PHY->>AP: radio symbols over the air
  AP-->>PHY: ACK symbols
  PHY-->>MAC: ACK
  MAC-->>App: delivered
blocks.zh:
sequenceDiagram
  participant App as 应用
  participant MAC
  participant PHY as 物理层 PHY
  participant AP
  App->>MAC: 数据 (MSDU)
  MAC->>PHY: 成帧字节 + 地址
  PHY->>AP: 无线符号经由空口
  AP-->>PHY: ACK 符号
  PHY-->>MAC: ACK
  MAC-->>App: 已送达

blocks.en: The MAC layer decides who may talk and stamps the frame with addresses — who sent it and who should receive it. It also numbers frames so duplicates can be spotted.
blocks.zh: MAC 层决定谁可以发送，并为帧打上地址——谁发送、谁接收。它还为帧编号，以便发现重复帧。

blocks.en: The PHY (physical layer) turns those bytes into radio symbols: it picks a modulation and coding, adds a preamble the receiver can lock onto, and drives the antenna. On the other side, the PHY reverses all of this back into bytes.
blocks.zh: PHY（物理层）把这些字节变成无线符号：选择调制与编码，加上接收方可锁定的前导，再驱动天线。在另一端，PHY 把这一切逆转回字节。

blocks.en: If no acknowledgement (ACK) comes back, the sender assumes the frame was lost and retransmits. This retry is invisible to your app — it just sees a slightly slower delivery.
blocks.zh: 若没有收到确认帧（ACK），发送方就认为该帧丢失并重传。这次重试对你的应用不可见——它只会感到送达略慢了一点。

blocks.en: Two tracks lie ahead: 802.11 Core digs into the MAC — frames, addressing, and taking turns — while the Modern PHY track (later) opens up modulation, OFDMA, and antennas.
blocks.zh: 前方有两条轨道：“802.11 核心”深入 MAC——帧、地址与轮流；而“现代物理层”轨道（稍后）将展开调制、OFDMA 与天线。
